## Description

What does this PR do? Why is it needed?

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] Read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md), including
      "What we do NOT accept"
- [ ] Opened an issue first for non-trivial changes (>50 lines)
- [ ] Added / updated tests for the change
- [ ] All tests pass locally
      (`go test ./internal/... && cd dashboard && npx vitest run`)
- [ ] Commit is signed off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] No changes to `internal/wallet/constants.go` or
      `dashboard/src/constants/contracts.ts` (official addresses)
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-visible behavior changed
